stories.summary: Phase 1: Extend TwistedConfig with step_skills + step_review_skills; add review_skill + context_skills to AgentResponse
Phase 2: Wire step_skills and step_review_skills defaults in defaults.ts
Phase 3: Build vendor skill copy — build/skills/vendor.ts with auto-clone, provenance headers, directory output
Phase 4: Step dispatch — add decompose command, skill resolution + invoke_skill emission in steps.ts
Phase 5: Verify step_skills flows through resolveConfig and deepMerge
Phase 6: Docs — README bundled skills attribution + SKILL.md skill dispatch documentation
Phase 7: Manually update build/schema/settings.ts with step_skills and step_review_skills; regenerate schema
